description_long: This is a sprawling, modern bungalow complex with multiple interconnected structures, each surrounded by landscaped greenery and paved driveways. The main building features a large swimming pool, several outdoor seating areas, and a variety of rooms visible through large windows and open spaces. The property includes multiple parking areas with cars, as well as separate smaller buildings or wings connected by walkways. Trees and shrubs are strategically placed throughout the grounds, providing shade and visual interest. The roofs are predominantly flat, with some sections featuring overhangs or pergolas. The overall design emphasizes open, airy spaces and a seamless connection between indoor and outdoor living.
description: A modern, multi-wing bungalow complex with flat roofs, a large pool, landscaped grounds, and multiple parking areas. The design features open spaces, large windows, and interconnected buildings.
description_view_0: View 0 shows the main entrance area, central courtyard, and a clear view of the pool and outdoor seating, with parking and landscaped paths visible.
description_view_1: View 1 highlights the pool area, rear parking, and the arrangement of the main and secondary buildings, with more emphasis on the backyard and open spaces.
description_view_2: View 2 provides a perspective of the rear and side wings, showing the pool enclosure, additional parking, and the spatial relationship between the buildings.
description_view_3: View 3 focuses on the driveway approach, front parking, and the main building's facade, with the pool and side wings visible in the background.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows and sliding glass doors
